findings.description: The XML code example closes the component element with `</component>` but the source file uses `</property>` as the final closing tag. The knowledge file deviates from the source text, even if the source appears to contain a typo.
findings.source_evidence: Source ends the XML block with `    </property>` (closing the outer `<component>` element with wrong tag), but knowledge file uses `</component>`.

findings.description: The return value contract for `onError` is omitted. The source Javadoc documents both cases: return true = 処理継続（次のSyncMessagingEventHookを呼ぶ、次がない場合はresponseMessageを返す）; return false = 引数eをthrowする。Only the `return false` / system error pattern is described.
findings.source_evidence: Source Javadoc on onError: 「trueの場合は処理継続。次の{@link SyncMessagingEventHook}を呼ぶ。次がない場合は、MessageSender#sendSync(SyncMessage)の戻り値として、引数responseMessageの値を返す。falseの場合は、本メソッド終了後に引数eをthrowする」

findings.description: Five sections have content `"なし"` (3 characters), well below the 50-character threshold. These empty placeholder sections appear throughout the index as intros or anchor-redirect entries but carry no substantive information.
findings.source_evidence: s3 content: "なし"; s5 content: "なし"; s7 content: "なし"; s9 content: "なし"; s11 content: "なし"

findings.description: The PascalCase class `RM11AC0202RequestForm` appears in the s10 code example (`RM11AC0202RequestForm requestForm = getRequestForm(input)`) but is absent from the hints array.
